basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) Refractionist Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of HAL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HAL Refractionist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years as on 01 May 2026. Age relaxation will be as per company rules.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC / PUC with Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course
qualification.details: SSLC / PUC with Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Refractionist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
